Quick actions

Student master

NameCategoryModeLevelPreferred dayPreferred timeFee / classDurationActions
No students yet — click "Add student" to begin.
Archive keeps a student's full class and payment history and can be undone any time — it's the safe default. Delete permanently removes the student and all their classes and payments, after a double confirmation (with a brief Undo).

This week\'s scheduling

Nothing on the calendar yet — click "Schedule class" to book the first one.
Click any class to edit it, change attendance, or cancel. Batch classes show both students in one block.

Monthly billing

StudentCompletedFee / classDue this monthCarried fwdPaidBalanceInvoice
No Personal students yet — billing applies only to Personal students.
Only completed Personal classes are billed — each student at their own fee, even inside a batch class. Cancelled classes and absences are never billed. A negative balance means an advance; it rolls into the next month automatically.

Record a payment

DateStudentBilling monthModeAmountActions

Record a withdrawal

money moved from the RAGA website to your account

Withdrawal register

DateModeRemarksAmountActions
No withdrawals recorded yet — your first one starts the rolling 30-day cycle.

Monthly earnings

StudentCompletedRateEarnedAll-time
No RAGA students yet — add one to start tracking earnings.
Earnings accrue the moment you mark a RAGA class completed, at each student's saved rate. This tracker mirrors the RAGA website — it never affects your Personal billing.

Export to Excel

Student masterEvery student with contact, slot, fee and status
Class registerEvery class with attendance, topic and homework — a RAGA-only month is ready to send to RAGA Shiksha
Personal billing summaryCompleted classes, due, paid and balance per student per month
Payment registerEvery payment received, with mode and reference
RAGA earnings & withdrawalsEarnings per student plus the withdrawal register — two sheets
Student statementOne student's full class history and payments — ideal to share with a student or parent
Financial Year summaryTotal Personal + RAGA income, April to March, with a month-by-month breakdown — ready for your own filing
Complete Data ExportYour entire records in one workbook — students, classes, billing, payments and RAGA earnings, each on its own sheet
Reports download as .xlsx (Excel). If the Excel library hasn't loaded (offline), the same data downloads as CSV files instead.

Monthly income

Personal + RAGA · * current month so far · tap a bar for the split

Earnings trend

Personal · RAGA · work done per month
Income counts money on the date it reached you; earnings count classes in the month they were taught. The two telling different stories is normal — it's the gap between work done and money collected.

Tanpura

a synthesized drone — no recordings, generated live

your compositions — lyrics, meaning and the notation PDF, searchable by raga, tala, composer or deity

Recordings

your voice library — record once, reuse across any student or class

Recordings are stored on this device only — they won't travel with your Google Drive backup.

Tala visualizer

build a tala from Laghu, Dhruta and Anudhruta, watch the hand count it, save it for reuse
Tap Play to begin
♫ Tanpura playing

Add student

A student is entered once and reused everywhere.
When scheduling either of them, the other is added automatically — swap to solo any time in the class form.
Fee changes apply to future classes only — completed classes keep the rate at which they were taught.

Add composition

Title, raga, tala, composer and deity tag it for search. Lyrics and meaning stay as searchable text — attach the notation PDF you've already made from Word, if you have it.
Stored on this device only — it won't travel with your Google Drive backup.

Tap the mic to start — your phone will ask for microphone access the first time.

Give it a name so you can reload it any time — e.g. "Adi tala" or "Rupaka practice".

Usual batch partner added automatically — pick "none" above to schedule solo.

Heads Up

Today, tomorrow, and what's pending.

Import backup

Merge combines the file with what's already here — new records are added, and where a record exists in both, the newer version wins. Nothing is deleted.

Replace wipes current data and loads the file exactly as it is. Use this to restore a known-good backup.

Connect Google Drive

One-time setup. Create a free Google OAuth Client ID (see the setup guide), then paste it here — it is saved on this device.
Forget saved ID

Drive snapshots

A copy of your data is kept automatically on the first sync of each day — the latest 8 days are retained. Restore any of them below.

All completed classes

Every completed class, with material status — search, filter, or mark it right here.
DateStudentTopicBilledMaterialAction
No completed classes match these filters.

Drive and this device differ

Merge combines both — new records added, newer version wins, nothing deleted. The result is saved back to Drive.

Keep this device overwrites Drive with what's here. Use Drive copy overwrites this device with Drive's data.
It's a new day since this page was opened — some dates may be out of date.
